title: panicum malacophyllum var. elongatum
intro: Panicum malacophyllum var. elongatum, also known as perennial panic grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. Traditionally used in medicine, this plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of perennial panic grass include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
